message:
test(vfs): add 13 MemoryVfs contract tests covering Vfs+VfsFile trait surface

Sync idempotency, write_page_batch, lock escalation ladder, close/reopen
persistence, access checks, full_pathname, randomness determinism, overwrite
in place, sector_size/device_characteristics, is_memory, truncate-then-read,
vfs_name, delete-then-access.

br-3u7.4 — VFS contract test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
